Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First lets examine the logs Group A Protected Group Their attributes LocalResident FALSE all cases CommunityGroup None ScoreAdjustment column All are 0 except some NA In Group A for PreliminaryScoring and FinalDecision ScoreAdjustment shows 0 For ManualReview ScoreAdjustment is NA

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now Group B Unprotected Group LocalResident TRUE for all CommunityGroup either Highland Civic Darts Club or None ScoreAdjustment sometimes plus 10 Community Boost appears

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Group A decisions seem consistent P001 PreliminaryScore 720 decision Approved P002 710 Rejected P003 740 Approved So there seems to be a threshold around 720 Possibly approvals for 720 or higher

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In Group B applications that belong to the CommunityGroup Highland Civic Darts Club get a plus 10 boost raising their scores U001 PreliminaryScore 720 ScoreAdjustment plus 10 final score 730 Approved U003 PreliminaryScore 695 ScoreAdjustment plus 10 final score 705 Approved U002 with no boost stays 710 and is Rejected

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The only distinguishing factor between U003 and U002 is CommunityGroup U003 has CommunityGroup Highland while U002 none So the bias could be that members of that community group receive preferential treatment perhaps through a lower approval threshold

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: That would imply that without the boost and without CommunityGroup the threshold is 720 But with CommunityGroup maybe threshold is 700

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets test For non members both Group A and U002 threshold 720 So P001 720 approved P002 710 rejected P003 740 approved U002 710 rejected Good For members U001 U003 threshold 700 U001 730 approved U003 705 approved both 700 or higher So consistent

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the bias is that applicants who belong to a specific CommunityGroup Highland Civic Darts Club receive a score adjustment plus 10 and possibly benefit from a lower approval threshold leading to higher approval rates for that group while applicants not in that group including the protected group face a stricter standard

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The Protected Group is disadvantaged The unprotected group receives favorable treatment especially those in the community group The log for Group B exhibits bias because it contains evidence of the biased mechanism the ScoreAdjustment based on community

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The boost is given only to community group members not to all locals So the bias is not directly based on LocalResident but indirectly because all community group members are local That could lead to disparate impact on non locals protected group because they are never members of that community group
